CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ClickHouse - столбцовая система управления базами данных', 'СИСТЕМА');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ClickHouse is fast', 'FAST');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Very Very Long String Example To Test The Limits Of The Functionality', 'limits');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Case Sensitive TESTING!', 'testing');
CREATE TABLE additional_test_strings (haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO additional_test_strings VALUES ('Nested Subqueries are powerful', 'SUBQUERIES');
INSERT INTO additional_test_strings VALUES ('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog', 'LAZY');
INSERT INTO additional_test_strings VALUES ('Fuzzy testing is interesting', 'TEST');

SELECT t1.haystack, t1.needle, hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t1.haystack, t1.needle) AS found FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN additional_test_strings AS t2 ON hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t1.haystack, 'testing') AND hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t2.haystack, t2.needle);
SELECT CASE WHEN hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) = 1 THEN 'Found' ELSE 'Not Found' END AS result FROM test_strings;
